data.title: A whale sold 1,230 MKR in the past 8 hours, making a profit of $418,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, in the past 8 hours, a whale inveteratus.eth sold 1,230 MKRs at about $1,448, obtained 1.78 million USDC, and made a profit of $418,000 (+30.6%) in less than a month.
As early as April 2024, the whale had made a profit of $1.86 million through MKR transactions. So far, its cumulative profit has reached $2.27 million (+107%), and it has maintained a 100% winning rate.

data.title: Golem Network Transfers Significant ETH to CEX
data.description: According to Odaily, the decentralized computing power marketplace, Golem Network, has transferred a total of 4,850 ETH, valued at $13.26 million, to centralized exchanges (CEX) over the past 12 hours. The team's multi-signature address moved 7,125 ETH to this address yesterday, leaving a balance of 2,300 ETH, which may soon be transferred to trading platforms. Golem Network had previously made frequent ETH deposits to exchanges between July and August 2024.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes Devconnect in Argentina amid LIBRA fallout
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed that the next Devconnect conference be held in Argentina following the fallout from the LIBRA coin debacle. Such a proposal was well-received by the President of Argentina, Javier Milei, who showed anticipation of the event. Buterin has, in the past, considered Argentina to be one of the best examples […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-devconnect-in-argentina/

data.title: Gate.io Announces Strategic Investment in DEXX to Support Platform Relaunch and Long-term Development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io, the world's leading digital asset trading platform, announced that it has completed a strategic investment in the on-chain trading platform DEXX. Gate.io has always adhered to the concept of protecting user rights and interests and is committed to promoting the security, transparency and sustainable development of the blockchain industry. This strategic investment will provide strong support for DEXX's recovery process, promote the orderly recovery of its business, and help achieve long-term and stable development in the future.
It is reported that the strategic investment funds will be used to support DEXX's restart plan, help the platform's business to recover in an orderly manner, and achieve long-term and stable development in the future. As one of the world's earliest cryptocurrency exchanges, Gate.io has always been committed to providing global users with safe and efficient trading services and promoting the application and popularization of blockchain technology. Through this investment, Gate.io once again demonstrated its leadership in the global Web3 ecosystem and actively responded to the industry's needs for security, trust and sustainable development. Gate.io expects this move to set more positive examples for the industry and promote the healthy development of Web3 technology.
Earlier news, on November 16, 2024, the DEXX platform was hit hard by a hacker attack.

data.title: Microsoft Prepares For Upcoming OpenAI Model Releases
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Microsoft is gearing up for the release of OpenAI's latest models. GPT-4.5 is anticipated to be launched as early as next week, while GPT-5 is expected to be available by late May. The updated GPT-5 model will bring significant improvements to the usage of ChatGPT, aiming to unify OpenAI's 'o' series and GPT series models, thereby reducing confusion for users when selecting models.

data.title: Utah Bitcoin Reserve Bill Enters Second Senate Reading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Legislation allowing Utah to invest in Bitcoin has been passed by a state Senate subcommittee. The HB230 "Blockchain and Digital Innovation Amendment" bill passed the Utah Revenue and Taxation Subcommittee on February 20 with a 4-2-1 vote and is currently undergoing second and third readings before a final Senate vote. The Bitcoin Reserve Act has passed the House of Representatives, so if it is approved in the Senate, Utah Republican Governor Spencer Cox only needs to sign the bill for Bitcoin to become a state reserve asset. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Golem Network has deposited 4,850 ETH to CEX in the past 12 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the decentralized computing power market platform Golem Network has recharged 4,850 ETH to CEX in the past 12 hours, worth 13.26 million US dollars.
The team's multi-signature address transferred a total of 7,125 ETH to the address yesterday, and there are still 2,300 remaining, which may be transferred to the trading platform in the near future; Golem also frequently recharged ETH to the trading platform from July to August 2024.

data.title: OpenAI GPT-4.5 is expected to be launched as early as next week, and GPT-5 may be released in late May
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Microsoft is preparing for OpenAI's latest model. GPT-4.5 is expected to be released as early as next week, and Microsoft expects GPT-5 to be released in late May. The updated GPT-5 will make major improvements to the way ChatGPT is used, unifying OpenAI's o series and GPT series models, reducing user confusion in choosing models. (The Verge)

data.title: 4E: Walmart's earnings warning drags down US stocks, while the crypto market rebounds
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Walmart's performance guidance was lower than market expectations. As an important indicator of US consumer spending, its signal of slowing growth has triggered investors' concerns about stagnant consumer spending. According to 4E monitoring, the three major U.S. stock indexes closed lower on Thursday. Walmart's stock price plummeted 6.53%, dragging the Dow Jones Industrial Average down 1.01%, marking its biggest one-day drop in nearly five weeks; the S&P 500 fell 0.43% and the Nasdaq fell 0.47%. Large technology stocks were generally under downward pressure.
The crypto market has been sluggish since February, and pessimism was once prevalent. However, after falling as low as $93,000 on Tuesday, Bitcoin prices continued to rebound as the market seemed to gradually digest the impact of Trump's tariff policy and optimistic expectations that the Russia-Ukraine conflict might be resolved. As of now, Bitcoin is trading at $98,146, up 1.2% in the past 24 hours. The altcoin market also showed signs of recovery, especially the newly launched coins that generally saw a significant increase, and market sentiment improved significantly.
In terms of foreign exchange commodities, affected by the tariff plan and economic data, the US dollar index fell by 0.7%; the decline in US fuel inventories and the weakening of the US dollar provided support for oil prices, which rose for three consecutive days; the safe-haven demand pushed spot gold to a record high of US$2,954 at one point, and then the increase narrowed to 0.22%.
U.S. stocks retreated from record highs on Thursday as weak retail earnings reports and U.S. unemployment claims data heightened market concerns about declining consumer confidence and the impact of tariff policies on the economy. Traders generally remained cautious. As a financial trading platform that supports assets such as cryptocurrencies, stock indices, bulk gold, and foreign exchange, 4E recently launched a USDT stablecoin wealth management product with an annualized yield of 8%, providing investors with a potential safe-haven option. 4E reminds you to pay attention to market volatility risks and allocate assets rationally.

data.title: The top whale on the PAIN pre-sale list has not sold any tokens yet, with a floating profit of nearly $2.4 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, the top whale on the PAIN pre-sale list has not sold any tokens yet, with a floating profit of $2.39 million.
He invested 20,000 SOLs in the pre-sale two weeks ago (actually invested 4,000 after the refund, about $860,000); after receiving 215,327 PAINs yesterday, he transferred 30,145 to two new addresses and did not sell them, which is the current TOP1 address of personal holdings.
